evals.prompt: Look up the entity 7ed45f2bc48b419e8e4664d5ff680b0d and show its name, types, and properties.
evals.expected_output: A single-entity fetch via the entity(id:) query returning name, types, and typed value fields (this ID is the Person type entity — stable fixture).
assertions: Uses the entity(id: "...") query (single-entity lookup), not a list query
Reads typed value fields (text/date/boolean/...), not a single 'value' field
Does not wrap entity fields in nodes { ... }
If the result comes back as an empty stub (null name, empty spaceIds/types), reports the entity does not exist rather than presenting the stub

evals.prompt: Find the first 50 Person entities in the AI space (41e851610e13a19441c4d980f2f2ce6b).
evals.expected_output: A bounded search using entities(typeId, spaceId, first: 50) returning a flat array of id/name.
assertions: Passes typeId and spaceId as top-level args (not inside filter)
Treats entities() as a flat array (no nodes wrapper)
Uses first: 50 (a small bounded lookup)

evals.prompt: List every Claim in the AI space — there are several thousand.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes the result set exceeds the pagination caps and uses entitiesConnection with cursor pagination.
assertions: Uses entitiesConnection with after/endCursor pagination
Does not paginate past offset 1000 on ANY shape (offset caps apply to Connections too) and keeps first <= 1000
Loops until pageInfo.hasNextPage is false

evals.prompt: Which News stories in the World affairs space (89bd89bf28ff8a0963faf92a8c905e20) are about the Iran War topic (10ed4f5ac9b84917ac801d0478fdbb69)?
evals.expected_output: ONE server-side filtered query (entities with relations:{some:{toEntityId}} or relations(toEntityId:) / backlinks) — never a per-story loop.
assertions: Uses a single server-side relation filter, not an N+1 loop fetching each story's relations
Scopes the relation filter with spaceId
Paginates the filtered result with cursors if it may exceed 1000

evals.prompt: List the blocks/tables of page 49fbca0730974581a9f0300d52fd22d6 (the World affairs space page) in the order they appear on the page.
evals.expected_output: Fetches the page's Blocks relations with the position field and orders by it (server orderBy: POSITION_ASC or lexicographic sort) — not response order.
assertions: Requests the position field on the Blocks relations
Orders blocks by position (POSITION_ASC or lexicographic client sort), not natural response order

evals.prompt: A Blocks relation has edge id X and entityId Y. Read the relation's own properties (e.g. its view setting).
evals.expected_output: Reads the relation ENTITY (entityId / inline entity{}), never the edge id — and checks the relation-entity's relations too, not just values.
assertions: Targets entityId (or the inline entity{} field), NOT the relation edge id
Checks both valuesList and relationsList on the relation entity (settings like View are relations)

evals.prompt: Find Person entities that are missing a name.
evals.expected_output: A none-exclusion (or valuesExist) filter SCOPED by spaceId/typeId — with the warning that unscoped exclusion runs ~20x slower.
assertions: Uses values:{none:...} or valuesExist with a spaceId (and typeId) scope
Does not run the exclusion unscoped across the whole graph without flagging the cost

evals.prompt: The entity 2f8238b2f4c899fb23b4a2f8aabd996c shows the type 'Topic' six times. Does it have duplicate types that need cleaning up?
evals.expected_output: Groups the Types edges by relation spaceId: cross-space repeats are healthy multi-space assertions, NOT duplicates; only same-space repeats are flagged as true duplicates, named by space.
assertions: Queries the Types relations (typeId 8f151ba4de204e3c9cb499ddf96f48f1) with the nodes{} wrapper and reads spaceId per edge
Does NOT report cross-space type repeats as duplicates; explains one Types edge per space is normal for multi-space entities
Flags only same-space repeats as true duplicates and names the space they're in
Notes that a cross-space edge can't be deleted from outside its own space (silent no-op)
